expectations.text: Output contains YAML frontmatter (fenced by ---) with at least tags, date, and status fields
expectations.evidence: Frontmatter present with tags (project, client, active), status (active), and created (2026-04-24) fields between --- fences

expectations.text: Output uses wikilinks [[Meridian Consulting]] and [[HR Portal Requirements]], not markdown links
expectations.evidence: [[Meridian Consulting]] appears on lines 18, 26, 31; [[HR Portal Requirements]] appears on lines 27, 32 — all as wikilinks, no markdown links used

expectations.text: Output includes at least 3 task items using - [ ] checkbox syntax
expectations.evidence: 5 task items found: lines 31-35 all use - [ ] syntax

expectations.text: Output uses a heading structure appropriate for a project note
expectations.evidence: H1 title on line 14, H2 sections: Overview (line 16), References (line 24), Tasks (line 29), Notes (line 37)

expectations.text: Output does not use any forbidden characters in file path (# ^ [ ] | \)
expectations.evidence: File is named note.md — no forbidden characters present in the file path

expectations.text: Due date is represented as 2026-06-30 in frontmatter

suggestions: Consider adding a 'date' field explicitly (in addition to 'created') to match the expectation wording more directly — though 'created' was accepted as equivalent here.
The note title uses an em dash (—) which could be considered for the file path expectation if the note were named after the title; the current output uses a safe filename 'note.md' instead.
eval_feedback.overall: Perfect pass — all 6 expectations met. The note is well-structured with proper YAML frontmatter, wikilinks, checkboxes, heading hierarchy, safe filename, and correct due date format. Efficient execution with only 3 tool calls and no errors.
